excludedCondition: - **Infectious posterior uveitides:** Toxoplasma posterior uveitis, herpes simplex virus (HSV), varicella-zoster virus (VZV), cytomegalovirus (CMV), tuberculosis, syphilis. - **Intraocular lymphoma and other masquerade syndromes:** Primary vitreoretinal lymphoma, metastatic malignancies, and other non-inflammatory mimics. - **Anterior uveitis, episcleritis/scleritis, and non-inflammatory mimics:** Conditions limited to the anterior segment or sclera without posterior segment involvement. - **Organ-specific findings without explicit uveitis diagnosis:** Cystoid macular edema (CME), retinal vasculitis, or other isolated findings not associated with a uveitis diagnosis.
